name: Sauce Cro-Magnon
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and blend in flour. Cook and stir until the roux takes on a little color.
2. Gradually add the beef consommé, white wine, and tomato pureé, stirring until the sauce thickens.
3. Cover the pan and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add the finely chopped truffle, mushrooms (sliced or sautéed), and Madeira. Stir gently without boiling.
5. Serve immediately.
